Caudalie: luxury wellness apothecary aesthetic — signature amber-brown glass apothecary bottles with gold accents and screw caps, ivory cream paper labels with the elegant CAUDALIE wordmark in thin black serif, grapevine motif, French vineyard-spa feel
Clarins: warm Parisian luxury — translucent amber-orange tinted glass bottles, brushed silver or matte rose-gold metal caps and pump components, beige cream labels with the CLARINS wordmark in red serif typography
Weleda: botanical organic apothecary — deep forest-green opaque tubes and jars with white wordmark WELEDA above a delicate hand-drawn line-art botanical motif (sprigs, leaves), white screw caps, hand-illustrated herbal pharmacy feel
Nuxe: warm honey-gold sensorial luxury — golden-amber translucent glass bottles or warm cream-and-gold tubes, gold rim accents and metallic gold lettering, the NUXE wordmark in elegant black sans-serif, ribbon-style sub-labels
A-Derma: minimalist medical-pharmacy — bright white tubes and bottles with a single teal-mint green accent band or cap, the A-DERMA wordmark in clean dark-blue sans-serif with a small oat-plant leaf icon, dermatological pharmacy aesthetic
Apivita: Greek honey-beehive natural luxury — soft amber-yellow tubes and jars with cream warm-gold labels, the APIVITA wordmark in dark teal sans-serif, hexagonal honeycomb pattern motif, golden warm tones
Marvis: Italian art-deco indulgence — vibrant flat-color squeeze tubes in saturated greens/blacks/silvers, vintage Florentine ornamental label panel with MARVIS wordmark in classical serif, gold or silver foil decorative borders, vintage Italian elegance
Roger & Gallet: vintage French apothecary — round bar soaps or cylindrical bottles wrapped in paper labels with delicate vintage botanical illustrations (flowers, citrus, leaves), the ROGER & GALLET wordmark in elegant black serif, Belle-Époque heritage feel
Yon-Ka: Parisian spa-clinical luxury — clean white opaque bottles with a vertical jade-green stripe accent and matte green pump-cap, YON-KA wordmark in clean dark serif, spa botanical aromatic feel
Eucerin: clinical German dermatology — pure white tubes/bottles with a deep navy-blue band or panel containing the product name, the Eucerin wordmark in lowercase italic dark navy with the signature downward chevron underline, medical authority
